author: Kimberley Mitchell
content:
Great food and a bonus is that they've always catered to my nut allergy with their salad boxes which are consistently filling, varied and super delicious. However, I have been advised that salad boxes are currently the only item on the menu that is safe with my allergy, so it may be worth keeping this in mind. This is the only reason I've rated 4* instead of 5*.

Has been our favourite go-to food place in Hayle for the past 3 years. The servers are also always happy which is a real bonus

It is worth noting that it can be quite difficult to park here though so it could be an idea to park nearby and walk over when busy (i.e. at lunchtime)
